title: SimpleJoinMessages
description: A configurable replacement to the default yellow join/leave message.
body:
![Simple Join Messages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/669086cff428befcb31423f73aa8d00f64763590.png)

A lightweight Minecraft plugin that lets you customize player join and quit messages with full color code support.

# 📌 Features
- Customizable join & quit messages in config.yml
- Supports Minecraft color codes (&a, &b, &l, etc.)

# 📥 Installation
1. Place the .jar file into your server's plugins folder.
2. Restart your server to generate the config.yml.

# ⚙ Configuration
Example config.yml:
```
messages:
  join: "&b{name} &6joined the lobby!"
  quit: "&c{name} &7has left the game."
```


# 🔗 Links
Need a custom plugin? Message me on Discord: https://discord.com/users/primimity
